allow: Bash(curl -s --max-time 15 -X POST 'https://ra.co/graphql' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Referer: https://ra.co/events/us/pittsburgh' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/123.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -d '{""query"":""{ area\(urlName: \\""pittsburgh\\""\) { id name urlName } }""}')

Bash(curl -v --max-time 15 -X POST 'https://ra.co/graphql' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Referer: https://ra.co/events/us/pittsburgh' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/123.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -d '{""query"":""{ area\(urlName: \\""pittsburgh\\""\) { id name urlName } }""}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); fields=[f for f in d[''data''][''__type''][''fields''] if f[''name''] in [''area'',''areas'',''eventListings'',''events'']]; print\(json.dumps\(fields, indent=2\)\)")
